---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who does it affect, and how often?

A clear problem statement is more useful than a solution description. Start here.

## Proposed Solution

What would you like to happen? Describe the behavior you want to see.

If you have thoughts on implementation, include them — but lead with the outcome, not the mechanics.

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've thought about and why you ruled them out (or didn't).

## Scope

Which repo does this apply to?

- [ ] `ellocharlie-engine` — controller, brain, dashboard, workflows
- [ ] `ellocharlie.com` — marketing site
- [ ] `ellocharlie-agents` — agent skills and runtime
- [ ] `ellocharlie-content` — blog, docs, content pipeline
- [ ] Cross-repo / org-level

## Priority Signal

Why does this matter now? Does it relate to a current OKR or KPI?

- [ ] Blocking an OKR (describe below)
- [ ] High-impact improvement
- [ ] Nice to have

## Additional Context

Mockups, references, related issues, or anything else that helps communicate the idea.
